link_adaptation: 129 unresolved relative documentation links were rewritten to pinned upstream GitHub URLs; 2 literal link placeholders were converted to explicit insert-link text
format_adaptation: trailing whitespace and extra final blank lines were normalized in imported text files

reviewed_script_skills.effects: reads a local plan and Git history; writes only to an explicit output path or .superpowers/sdd inside the current repository

stdlib-only Python (csv, re, pathlib, math, collections, json, os); no subprocess/eval/exec, no network calls, no credential or env-var access; reads CSV data files under its own data/ directory; with --persist writes only under an explicitly-passed --output-dir, skipping an existing MASTER.md unless --force is given. Smoke-tested with `python3 search.py "SaaS landing page hero dark modern" --design-system` (no --persist) — ran clean, no errors, no writes outside stdout.
reviewed_script_skills.note: Only the react/nextjs/vue/svelte/astro/swiftui/react-native/flutter/nuxtjs/nuxt-ui/html-tailwind/shadcn/jetpack-compose/threejs/angular/laravel/javafx/wpf/winui/avalonia/uno/uwp stack CSVs plus the 12 core domain CSVs and ui-reasoning.csv were vendored (all files referenced by core.py's CSV_CONFIG/STACK_CONFIG and design_system.py's REASONING_FILE). Repo tree was not exhaustively enumerated (GitHub API/codeload blocked for non-scoped repos in this session); paths were confirmed individually via raw.githubusercontent.com against the 3 skills already known from plugin.json + prior bundle import (banner-design, slides, ui-ux-pro-max).
